final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing brand style guide visual (color palette + typography specimen) for 染秋 (RAN QIU), an autumn fragrance brand rooted in Eastern philosophy and traditional Chinese dyeing aesthetics.

Style/medium: flat graphic design, brand style guide / visual identity sheet
Composition: 
Subject: primary color swatches, secondary/accent color swatches, and typography specimen for brand 染秋 (RAN QIU)
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: warm, poetic, quietly healing autumn atmosphere
Color palette: warm autumn tones inspired by osmanthus, persimmon, maple leaf, amber, sandalwood — deep burnt orange, muted persimmon red, golden osmanthus yellow, smoky oolong brown, soft amber, dark sandalwood as accent
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 染秋, RAN QIU, 桂花乌龙, 琥珀枫叶, 柿霜暮色
Constraints: layout must clearly separate primary colors from secondary/accent colors; include Chinese and Latin typeface specimens; label each color swatch with its name or hex code area
Avoid:
